Oak GroveStarkville

Warriors
54
Yellowjackets
57

The Starkville (MS) varsity football team won Friday's home non-conference game against Oak Grove (Hattiesburg, MS) by a score of 57-54.

Q1Q2Q3Q4Final
Oak Grove620141454
Starkville320211357
Final score provided by E. Griffith Jr.

Game Story

Mississippi High School Football - Oak Grove edged by Starkville

August 29, 2025: Starkville, MS 39759

The Starkville Yellowjackets got by the visiting Oak Grove Warriors football team by a score of 57-54 in Friday's non-league challenge.

In their next game, the Yellowjackets face the West Point Green Wave (West Point, MS) in a non-league challenge, on Friday, September 5. Starkville will attempt to improve on its 1-0 season record. The Green Wave go into the challenge with a 1-0 record after their 9-7 non-league win over Louisville (Louisville, MS).

The Warriors (0-1) will now prepare for their challenge against Germantown (Madison, MS). The Mavericks go into the non-league challenge with a 0-1 record. In their last challenge, Germantown was edged by Northwest Rankin (Brandon, MS), 24-17, in a non-league challenge.

Eric Griffith JrWarriors Reporter
Tyrese EllisYellowjackets Reporter

    Oak Grove @ Starkville Football Game Info

    Fri., Aug. 29, 2025 @ 7p
    The Starkville (MS) varsity football team won Friday's home non-conference game against Oak Grove (Hattiesburg, MS) by a score of 57-54.

    Your Privacy Choices

    MaxPreps and our third-party partners may use cookies and similar technologies to collect and disclose information about you and how you use the site for a variety of purposes, including personalizing and delivering ads, as further described in our Privacy Policy.

    By clicking Accept, you agree to the disclosure of information for these advertising purposes. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking Your Privacy Choices in the site footer.

    Your Privacy Choices

    MaxPreps is now part of 2080 Media, Inc. As described in our Privacy Policy, we and our third-party partners may use cookies and similar technologies to collect and disclose information about you and how you use the site for a variety of purposes, including personalizing and delivering ads, as further described in our Privacy Policy.

    If you live in certain U.S. states (e.g., California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Minnesota, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Oregon, Rhode Island, Texas, Utah and Virginia), some of these activities may be considered “sales” or “sharing” of your personal information, or “processing” of your personal information for “targeted advertising” purposes (as each term is defined under applicable state privacy laws), and you may have the right to opt out of these activities. Please visit the Your Rights and Choices section of our Privacy Policy for more information about your rights.

    If you would like to change your choices about these disclosures, please follow the instructions below:

    To change your choice relating to of our use of personal information associated with a device that may be considered “sales,” “sharing” or “targeted advertising” use the toggle below, make a selection, and press “Confirm My Choices.” You will need to renew this choice if you clear your browser cookies, or if you return to this site using a different browser or device.  This change only applies to this device and browser, so you will need to open the “My Privacy Choices” link on any other devices and browsers and follow this process again.

    Please make sure you click on the Save Settings button at the bottom or otherwise confirm your choices.

    If you are in one of the states listed above and have enabled the Global Privacy Control signal, we will treat this as a request to opt-out of “sales,” “sharing” and “targeted advertising” for device information. For more information about how to use the Global Privacy Control signal, please see here.

    Allow Sale, Sharing, Or Targeted Advertising
